svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.6 Chrome/144.0.7559.236 Electron/40.8.4 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.6" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="RL-Router-Architecture" id="rl-router-arch"> <mxGraphModel dx="1426" dy="841" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="input_zone" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#FFF9E6;strokeColor=#D6B656;strokeWidth=3;dashed=0;arcSize=6;" value="<font style="font-size: 20px;">Request Ingress</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="320" width="220" x="40" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prompt" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE8A8;strokeColor=#B89940;strokeWidth=3;fontSize=17;" value="Incoming Prompt
<i>(user request)</i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="60" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="planner" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE8A8;strokeColor=#B89940;strokeWidth=3;fontSize=17;" value="Task Planner
<i>tag ∈ {code, explain, tests}</i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="60" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prompt_to_planner" edge="1" parent="1" source="prompt" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#6B6B6B;strokeWidth=3;endFill=1;fontSize=17;" target="planner"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="router_zone" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#E8F0FB;strokeColor=#4A7BB7;strokeWidth=3;arcSize=3;" value="<font style="font-size: 20px;">RL Router</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="530" width="540" x="300" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="state_builder" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#CCDCF2;strokeColor=#4A7BB7;strokeWidth=3;fontSize=17;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<b>State &amp; Feature Builder</b>
<font>s<sub>t</sub> = [ x<sub>t</sub><sup>(0)</sup> ∥ ... ∥ x<sub>t</sub><sup>(K-1)</sup> ∥ prompt feats ]</font>
<font>per-backend: μ<sub>i</sub>, p50<sub>i</sub>, p95<sub>i</sub>, saturation q<sub>i</sub></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="500" x="320" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="policy" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#A7C6E8;strokeColor=#2E5A8F;strokeWidth=3;fontSize=17;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<b>Policy Network (Actor)</b>

π<sub>θ</sub>(a | s)

<font>categorical over K backends</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="230" x="320" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="critic" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#A7C6E8;strokeColor=#2E5A8F;strokeWidth=3;fontSize=17;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<b>Value Network (Critic)</b>

V<sub>φ</sub>(s)

<font>advantage: Â<sub>t</sub> = R<sub>t</sub> − V<sub>φ</sub>(s<sub>t</sub>)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="230" x="590" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="action_selector" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#CCDCF2;strokeColor=#4A7BB7;strokeWidth=3;fontSize=17;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<b>Action Selector</b>
a<sub>t</sub> ∈ {0, 1, ..., K−1}" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="440" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ppo_update" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F9D6C2;strokeColor=#C56B2A;strokeWidth=3;fontSize=17;dashed=1;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<b>PPO Update</b>
<font>L<sup>clip</sup>(θ) + c<sub>v</sub>L<sup>V</sup>(φ) − c<sub>e</sub>L<sup>H</sup>(θ)</font>
<font>triggered every N<sub>update</sub> requests</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="500" x="320" y="479" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="backend_zone" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#E8F5E4;strokeColor=#5B9B48;strokeWidth=3;arcSize=4;" value="<font style="font-size: 20px;">LLM Backend Pool&nbsp;</font><div><font style="font-size: 15px;">(Docker Containers)</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="460" width="360" x="880" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="backend0" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.azure.docker;html=1;fillColor=#C8E3BC;strokeColor=#5B9B48;strokeWidth=3;fontSize=17;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;" value="<b>Backend 0</b>
Mistral-7B-Instruct
<font>low-latency general</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="900" y="119" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="backend1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E3BC;strokeColor=#5B9B48;strokeWidth=3;fontSize=17;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<b>Backend 1</b>
LLaMA-3-8B-Instruct
<font>general-purpose, higher quality</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="900" y="214" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="backend2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E3BC;strokeColor=#5B9B48;strokeWidth=3;fontSize=17;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<b>Backend 2</b>
CodeLLaMA-7B-Instruct
<font>code-specialized</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="900" y="309" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reward_engine" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F9D6C2;strokeColor=#C56B2A;strokeWidth=3;fontSize=17;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<b>Reward Engine</b>
R<sub>t</sub> = α Q<sub>t</sub> − β L<sub>t</sub> − γ C<sub>t</sub>
<font>quality proxy • latency • token cost</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="900" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="buffer" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#F5D8A8;strokeColor=#B8860B;strokeWidth=3;fontSize=17;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<b>Experience Buffer</b><br><font style="font-size: 14px;">𝒟 = { (s<sub>t</sub>, a<sub>t</sub>, log π<sub>θ<sub>old</sub></sub>, V<sub>φ</sub>, R<sub>t</sub>) }</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="109" width="210" x="45" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="monitor_zone" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#808080;strokeWidth=3;dashed=1;" value="Observability" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="79" width="320" x="900" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prometheus" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#808080;strokeWidth=3;fontSize=17;" value="<font>Prometheus</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="920" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="grafana" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#808080;strokeWidth=3;fontSize=17;" value="Grafana" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="1080" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_planner_state" edge="1" parent="1" source="planner" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#4A7BB7;strokeWidth=3;endFill=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;fontSize=17;" target="state_builder"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="270" y="310" /> <mxPoint x="270" y="160" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_state_policy" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#4A7BB7;strokeWidth=3;endFill=1;entryX=0.478;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;fontSize=17;" target="policy"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="432" y="200" as="sourcePoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_state_critic" edge="1" parent="1" source="state_builder" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#4A7BB7;strokeWidth=3;endFill=1;exitX=0.83;exitY=1;entryX=0.627;entryY=-0.003;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;fontSize=17;" id="e_critic_action" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#888888;strokeWidth=3;endFill=1;dashed=1;exitX=0.197;exitY=1.004;entryX=0.75;entryY=0;fontSize=17;fontStyle=2;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;" id="e_action_backends" edge="1" parent="1" source="action_selector" id="e_buffer_update" edge="1" parent="1" source="buffer" target="policy" value="Δθ"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_update_critic" edge="1" parent="1" source="ppo_update" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#C56B2A;strokeWidth=3;endFill=1;dashed=1;exitX=0.902;exitY=0.025;entryX=0.8;entryY=1;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#808080;strokeWidth=3;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=17;" target="backend_zone"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=17;fillColor=#FAFAFA;strokeColor=#CCCCCC;rounded=1;strokeWidth=3;" value="<b>Legend</b> &nbsp; <font color="#4A7BB7">■</font> request / inference path &nbsp; <font color="#C56B2A">■</font> learning loop (online PPO update) &nbsp; <font color="#888888">- - -</font> gradient / signal flow &nbsp; &nbsp; K = number of LLM backends" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1200" x="40" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
